# PAH Step 6 External Validation and Top30 Report

- Date: 20260505
- Models: LightGBM + XGBoost + CatBoost
- Phases evaluated: 2A and 2B
- Ensemble: groupcv Spearman proportional weights
- Final Top30 file uses 2B boosting3 ensemble.

## Notes

- Lower `drug_level_score` is better because y is ln(IC50).
- EV cohort: GSE15197 PAH/control only; IPF-PH samples were excluded in Step1.
- Riociguat and Treprostinil are kept in clinical lookup but are not ranked if absent from the IC50/model pipeline.
